creator: smh@FreeBSD.org
text:
How often do you get the error?

Can you provoke it?

Given the error and the random nature you may have a hardware fault.

Have you tried a memory test?

There has been a lot of changes in EFI recently in head, while I'm not personally aware of any changes that might fix this, if you can provoke it regularly then it might be worth testing head to see if any of said changes do fix it.
